auth.registrationDisabledText: New account registration is currently disabled. Contact the administrator.
auth.sessionExpiredText: This link has expired or is invalid.
auth.signingInVia: Signing in via {{providerName}}. Choose your username and display name.
auth.whichAccount: Which account do you want to use?
auth.multipleAccountsLinked: Multiple Prism accounts are linked to your {{provider}} account{{profileSuffix}}. Pick one to sign in.
auth.emailOrUsernameRequired: Please enter your email or username first
auth.errorInvalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.errorNoToken: No authentication token was provided. Please sign in again.
auth.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please sign in again.
auth.inviteTokenHint: Required to create an account on this site
auth.inviteOnlyText: Registration requires an invite token. Contact an administrator to request access.

init.createAdminDesc: Create your admin account to get started.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailAdded: Email added — check your inbox for verification
profile.altEmailLoginHint: Allow logging in using your alternate email addresses instead of only the primary.

security.title: Security
security.totpDesc: Use apps like Authy or Google Authenticator. One set of backup codes is shared across all authenticators.
security.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
security.enterTotpToConfirm: Enter a TOTP code to confirm
security.saveBackupCodes: Save these backup codes — they won't be shown again:
security.passkeysDesc: Sign in with biometrics or a hardware security key.
security.gpgKeysDesc: Register GPG public keys to sign in without a password.
security.gpgPublicKeyPlaceholder:
-----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----
...
-----END PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----
security.gpgChallengePrompt: Sign the following text with your GPG key, then paste the output below.
security.gpgPrivateKeyPlaceholder:
-----BEGIN PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----
...
-----END PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----
security.gpgPrivacyNote: Your private key never leaves this browser.

dashboard.manageDesc: Manage your identity, applications, and connections.
dashboard.improveSecurityDesc: Add two-factor authentication or a passkey to protect your account.
dashboard.addPasskeyDesc: Sign in faster with biometrics or hardware keys.
dashboard.verifyEmailDesc: Your email is not yet verified. Please check your inbox or resend the verification email.
dashboard.verifySent: Verification email sent — please check your inbox.
dashboard.sendEmailTo: Send an email from your address to:

apps.noAppsDesc: Create your first OAuth application to get started.
apps.atLeastOneRedirectUri: At least one redirect URI required
apps.iconUrlHint: Publicly accessible image URL for the app icon
apps.publicClient: Public client (no client secret, PKCE required)
apps.secretRotated: Client secret rotated — save it now!
apps.saveSecretWarning: Save this secret now — it won't be shown again.
apps.appBelongsToTeam: This app belongs to a team.
apps.allAdminsCanManage: All admins and owners of the selected team will be able to manage this app.
apps.deleteAppDesc: This will permanently delete the app and revoke all associated tokens. This action cannot be undone.

domains.title: Domain Verification
domains.description: Verify domains to associate them with your apps. DNS TXT records are automatically re-verified periodically.
domains.dnsInstructions: Add this DNS TXT record to verify {{domain}}:
domains.txtRecordNotFound: TXT record not found yet. Make sure the DNS record is set and try again.
domains.removeDomainTeamDesc: Remove {{domain}} from this team's verified domains?
domains.moveDomainDesc: Move {{domain}} to a team. The domain will be removed from your personal domains and managed by the team.
domains.shareDomainDesc: Share {{domain}} with a team. The domain will also appear in the team's verified domains — your personal copy is kept.
domains.transferPersonalDesc: Move one of your verified personal domains into this team. It will be used to verify team apps.
domains.returnToPersonalTooltip: Move back to personal (removes from team)
domains.shareToPersonalTooltip: Share to your personal domains (keeps team copy)
domains.domainSharedToPersonal: Domain shared to your personal domains

teams.title: Teams
teams.noTeamsDesc: Create a team to collaborate on OAuth applications.
teams.domainsDesc: Verified team domains are used to mark team apps as verified. Add a DNS TXT record to prove ownership.
teams.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting this team will disown all team apps (they will return to their creators). This action cannot be undone.
teams.inviteEmailHint: Leave blank to create a shareable link
teams.noPersonalApps: You have no personal apps to migrate.
teams.migrateAppDesc: The app will be transferred to this team. All team admins and owners will be able to manage it.
teams.atLeastOneRedirectUri: At least one redirect URI required
teams.noAppsInTeam: No apps in this team yet.
teams.invalidInviteDesc: This invite link is invalid or has expired.
teams.invitedToJoinAs: You have been invited to join as
teams.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this team.
teams.signInToAccept: Sign in to accept this invite.

connections.title: Linked Accounts
connections.description: Connect third-party accounts to sign in faster. You can link multiple accounts from the same platform.
connections.disconnectDesc: {{name}} will be disconnected from your account.
connections.disconnectWarning: Make sure you have another sign-in method available.

tokens.title: Personal Access Tokens
tokens.subtitle: Personal access tokens let you authenticate API requests with specific scopes. Treat them like passwords.
tokens.saveWarning: Copy your token now — it will not be shown again.
tokens.name: Name

connectedApps.title: Connected Apps
connectedApps.description: Applications you have authorized to access your account. Revoking access signs you out of that app immediately.
connectedApps.noApps: No applications have been authorized yet.
connectedApps.revokeDesc: This will sign you out of {{name}} and delete all active tokens. The app will need your authorization again to access your account.

oauth.footerNote: By authorizing, you allow {{appName}} to access the requested information from your Prism account.
oauth.scopeProfileDesc: Access your name and profile picture
oauth.scopeAppsWriteDesc: Create, update, and delete your OAuth applications
oauth.scopeProfileWriteDesc: Update your display name and avatar
oauth.scopeTeamsDesc: View your team memberships and roles
oauth.scopeTeamsWriteDesc: Update team settings and manage team members
oauth.scopeTeamsCreateDesc: Create new teams on your behalf
oauth.scopeDomainsWriteDesc: Add and remove domains from your account
oauth.scopeAdminUsersReadDesc: List and view all user accounts (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminUsersWriteDesc: Update user roles, status, and profile fields (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminUsersDeleteDesc: Permanently delete user accounts (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminConfigWriteDesc: Update site settings such as registration policy and appearance (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminInvitesReadDesc: List all site invite links (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminInvitesCreateDesc: Generate site invite links (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminInvitesDeleteDesc: Delete and revoke site invite links (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminWebhooksReadDesc: List webhooks and view delivery history (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminWebhooksWriteDesc: Create, update, and test webhooks (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeAdminWebhooksDeleteDesc: Permanently delete webhooks and their delivery history (requires admin role)
oauth.scopeWebhooksReadDesc: List your webhooks and view delivery history
oauth.scopeWebhooksWriteDesc: Create, update, delete, and test your personal webhooks
oauth.scopeOfflineDesc: Access your data when you're not online

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage your Prism platform.
admin.deleteUserDesc: Delete {{username}} and all their data? This cannot be undone.
admin.cannotDisableSelf: You cannot disable your own account.
admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
admin.deleteTeamConfirm: Delete team "{{name}}"? Apps will be returned to their creators.
admin.socialVerifyTtlHint: Auto-verify email when a connected social provider confirms the same address. Set to 0 to never expire, or a number of days after which re-verification is required.
admin.allowAltEmailLogin: Allow login with alternate emails (site default)
admin.loginErrorRetentionDaysHint: How long to keep failed login records. Set to 0 to retain indefinitely.
admin.captchaPow: Proof of Work (no server key needed)
admin.socialLeaveBlank: Leave blank to disable a provider.
admin.emailReceiveHostHint: Domain for inbound verification emails (e.g. mail.example.com). Leave blank to use the APP_URL hostname.
admin.testEmailDesc: Sends a test email to your admin address.
admin.dangerDesc: Permanently delete all users, sessions, apps, tokens, and configuration. The platform will return to the setup screen. This cannot be undone.
admin.resetEverythingDesc: All users, sessions, OAuth apps, tokens, domains, and site configuration will be permanently deleted. The platform will restart setup. This cannot be undone.
admin.inviteEmailHint: Lock this invite to a specific email address
admin.inviteNoteHint: Shown in the invite email and in this list
admin.inviteNoInvites: No invites yet. Create one above.
admin.oauthSourcesHint: Configure multiple OAuth providers. Each source has a unique slug used in URLs.
admin.oauthNameHint: Shown on login buttons, e.g. GitHub (Work)
admin.oauthLeaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep current value
admin.oauthIssuerUrlHint: Provider issuer URL — used for OIDC auto-discovery
admin.oauthIssuerRequired: Issuer URL is required to discover endpoints
admin.oauthDiscoverFailed: Discovery failed — check the issuer URL and try again
admin.oauthMigrateBanner: Legacy OAuth credentials found in site settings ({{providers}}). Migrate them to OAuth Sources to enable multi-provider support.
admin.oauthMigrateAlreadyDone: All legacy providers are already migrated.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Receive HTTP POST notifications when audit log events occur.
webhooks.name: Name
webhooks.secretHint: Used to sign payloads (X-Prism-Signature header). Leave blank to auto-generate.
webhooks.empty: No webhooks configured. Create one to start receiving events.
webhooks.userSubtitle: Receive HTTP POST notifications when you trigger events.
webhooks.userEmpty: No webhooks configured. Create one to start receiving events.

notifications.title: Email Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which events send you an email. Notifications are delivered to your account email address.
notifications.noEmail: Email notifications are not configured on this server.
notifications.appCreatedDesc: When you create an OAuth application
notifications.appUpdatedDesc: When you update an OAuth application
notifications.appDeletedDesc: When one of your OAuth applications is deleted
notifications.domainAddedDesc: When you add a domain to your account
notifications.domainVerifiedDesc: When a domain you own is successfully verified
notifications.domainDeletedDesc: When a domain is removed from your account
notifications.connectionAddedDesc: When a social account is linked to your account
notifications.connectionRemovedDesc: When a social account is unlinked from your account
notifications.connectionLoginDesc: When someone signs in to your account via a social connection
notifications.profileUpdatedDesc: When your profile information is changed

verifyChoose.title: Verify Your Email
verifyChoose.desc: Choose how you'd like to verify your email address.
verifyChoose.linkDesc: We'll send a verification link to your email address.
verifyChoose.sendDesc: Send an email from your address to verify your identity.
verifyChoose.imapInstructions: Send an email with the verification code as the subject to the address below.
verifyChoose.notYetVerified: Not verified yet — make sure you sent the email and try again.
verifyChoose.linkSent: Verification link sent — check your inbox.

verifyEmail.successDesc: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now use all features of your account.
verifyEmail.invalidDesc: This verification link is invalid or has already been used. Please request a new verification email from your profile.

imageUrl.loadFailed: Could not load image from this URL
